scripts.build:workbench: vite build --config .workbench-src/vite.config.js && uv run --no-sync --with pillow python scripts/compress_firefly_images.py && uv run --no-sync --with pillow python scripts/compress_orbit_images.py && uv run --no-sync --with pillow python scripts/sync_www_assets.py
scripts.dev:workbench: uv run --no-sync --with pillow python scripts/compress_firefly_images.py && uv run --no-sync --with pillow python scripts/compress_orbit_images.py && vite --config .workbench-src/vite.config.js
